shop.signature: Every piece signed and dated on the underside.

project.note: First of the grandchild cradles. Joined with hand cut dovetails.
Cherry to darken with age. Matched the rockers to William's.
Walnut from the windbreak tree that came down in the 2018 storm.

project.for: the ranch house, Eleanor's table seating
project.note: Reglued a loose leg and leveled the feet before the holidays.

project.wood: clear pine, one inch by ten inch, about sixteen board feet
project.note: Two fixed shelves, low enough for a six year old. Boiled linseed oil finish, two coats a day apart. Travels to Casper for the family dinner.

stock.item: number eight screws and wood glue

shop.carry_forward: Good work takes the time it takes. No hurry on the bookcase, but oiled and signed before the cold drive over.
